creator: nobutaka@nobutaka.com
text:
Update graphics/gimp1-i18n port from 1.1.3 to 1.1.5.
And I fixed broken GNU gettext PO files.

Removed file: patches/patch-ae
New file:     patches/patch-aq
                      patch-ar
                      patch-as
                      patch-at
                      patch-au
                      patch-av
                      patch-aw
                      patch-ax
                      patch-ay
                      patch-az
                      patch-ba

Fix: Please apply this patch to current port.
It is compressed because it is very large (137KB).
